# Gene Expression Omnibus (GEO)

Five publicly available single-cell RNA sequencing datasets related to oral cancer (GSE164690, GSE172577, GSE188737, GSE215403, and GSE234933) were collected [PMID: 40284904, 34044317, 36973261, 37792582, 37535729]. Only oral tumor samples were included, resulting in a total of 47 samples. Quality control was performed on each dataset separately. The datasets were then integrated using the CCA algorithm implemented in Seurat (v5.3.0) [PMID: 37231261]. Cells were clustered using the standard Seurat workflow, followed by cell type annotation based on the basis of canonical markers. The datasets were then integrated using the CCA algorithm implemented in Seurat (v5.3.0) [PMID: 37231261]. Cells were clustered using the standard Seurat workflow, followed by cell type annotation based on the basis of canonical markers.
